sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: combo_system
special_mechanics.description: Reduced recovery times for attacks making combos easier to perform

special_mechanics.name: knockback
special_mechanics.description: Roundhouse kicks and uppercuts knock opponent across the screen

special_mechanics.name: mid_air_special_moves
special_mechanics.description: Returning characters gained new special moves including those usable mid-air

tier_notes: Tier 1 (empirical/qualitative): Sources provide game mechanics overview but lack precise physics parameters. Documentation notes gameplay plays 'almost twice as fast' as original MK1, has reduced attack recovery times, and improved combo execution. No ROM-level values or sub-pixel data available in sources.
